revision.comment: 新しいページ：皇子塚古墳（群馬県藤岡市にある古墳）。
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 皇子塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘 |別名 = |所属 = [[白石古墳群]] |所在地 = [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木（字東原）
（毛野国白石丘陵公園内） |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 15|緯度秒 = 33.72 |経度度 =139|経度分 = 2|経度秒 = 30.10 |ISO = JP-10 |形状 = [[円墳]] |規模 = 直径31m（30m）
高さ6m |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]] |出土品 = [[装飾大刀]]・弓金具・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉・馬具・[[埴輪]]・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]後半 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 群馬県指定史跡「皇子塚古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |アイコン = 円墳 |ラベル = 皇子塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''皇子塚古墳'''（おうじづかこふん）は、[[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[円墳]]。[[白石古墳群]]を構成する古墳の1つ。群馬県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 概要 == [[ファイル:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|thumb|200px|right|{{center|単龍環頭大刀柄頭}}{{small|藤岡歴史館展示。}}]] 群馬県南部、鮎川左岸において舌状に張り出した河岸段丘東端に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。北には[[平井地区1号墳]]が隣接する。[[1988年]]（[[昭和]]63年）・[[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（[[平成]]25-26年度）に範囲確認調査が実施されている。 墳形は円形で、直径31メートル（または30メートル{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}）・高さ6メートルを測る史跡説明板。。墳丘は4段築成。墳丘表面では[[葺石]]のほか[[円筒埴輪]]・[[形象埴輪]]（人物形・馬形・盾形・靫形・大刀形・翳形・鞆形埴輪など）が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。主体部の埋葬施設は両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室であり、石室内部からは[[装飾大刀]]の金銅装単龍環頭大刀柄頭のほか弓金具2・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉3・馬具が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。築造時期は[[古墳時代]]後期の[[6世紀]]後半頃と推定され（平井地区1号墳とほぼ同時期）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}、[[7世紀]]前半までの追葬が認められる。 古墳域は[[1992年]]（平成4年）に群馬県指定史跡に指定された。現在では史跡整備のうえで毛野国白石丘陵公園内で公開されている。 === 来歴 === * [[1988年]]（[[昭和]]63年）、史跡整備に伴う範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[1989年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 * [[1992年]]（[[平成]]4年）5月15日、群馬県指定史跡に指定。 * [[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（平成25-26年度）、範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[2015年]]に報告書刊行）。 == 埋葬施設 == 主体部の埋葬施設としては両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室である。石室の規模は次の通り。 * 石室全長：8.33メートル * 玄室：長さ3.52メートル、奥幅2.1メートル、高さ1.6メートル * 前室：長さ1.89メートル * 羨道：長さ2.64メートル 玄室は凝灰岩の切石の切組手法により、前室・羨道は川原石の乱石積みによって構築される{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。玄室の中央には凝灰岩の間仕切り石3石が据えられて玄室の奥・手前を区画するほか、玄門の間には凝灰岩の梱石が据えられる{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 石室の前庭部では須恵器（提瓶・平瓶）・盾形埴輪が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 == 文化財 == === 群馬県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 皇子塚古墳 - 1992年（平成4年）5月15日指定{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf 群馬県内の県指定文化財一覧]}}（群馬県ホームページ）。[https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳]（藤岡市ホームページ）。。 == 関連施設 == * 藤岡歴史館（藤岡市白石） - 皇子塚古墳の出土品等を保管・展示。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * 史跡説明板（群馬県教育委員会・藤岡市教育委員会設置） * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1989|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳（範囲確認調査報告書IV）|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[白石古墳群]] == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳] - 藤岡市ホームページ {{DEFAULTSORT:おうしつかこふん ふしおかし}} [[Category:群馬県の古墳]] [[Category:藤岡市の歴史]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:群馬県指定史跡]]

{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 皇子塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘 |別名 = |所属 = [[白石古墳群]] |所在地 = [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木（字東原）
（毛野国白石丘陵公園内） |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 15|緯度秒 = 33.72 |経度度 =139|経度分 = 2|経度秒 = 30.10 |ISO = JP-10 |形状 = [[円墳]] |規模 = 直径31m（30m）
高さ6m |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]] |出土品 = [[装飾大刀]]・弓金具・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉・馬具・[[埴輪]]・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]後半 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 群馬県指定史跡「皇子塚古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |アイコン = 円墳 |ラベル = 皇子塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''皇子塚古墳'''（おうじづかこふん）は、[[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[円墳]]。[[白石古墳群]]を構成する古墳の1つ。群馬県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 概要 == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|左に[[平井地区1号墳]]、右に皇子塚古墳}}]] [[ファイル:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|thumb|200px|right|{{center|単龍環頭大刀柄頭}}{{small|藤岡歴史館展示。}}]] 群馬県南部、鮎川左岸において舌状に張り出した河岸段丘東端に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。北には[[平井地区1号墳]]が隣接する。[[1988年]]（[[昭和]]63年）・[[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（[[平成]]25-26年度）に範囲確認調査が実施されている。 墳形は円形で、直径31メートル（または30メートル{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}）・高さ6メートルを測る史跡説明板。。墳丘は4段築成。墳丘表面では[[葺石]]のほか[[円筒埴輪]]・[[形象埴輪]]（人物形・馬形・盾形・靫形・大刀形・翳形・鞆形埴輪など）が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。主体部の埋葬施設は両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室であり、石室内部からは[[装飾大刀]]の金銅装単龍環頭大刀柄頭のほか弓金具2・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉3・馬具が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。築造時期は[[古墳時代]]後期の[[6世紀]]後半頃と推定され（平井地区1号墳とほぼ同時期）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}、[[7世紀]]前半までの追葬が認められる。 古墳域は[[1992年]]（平成4年）に群馬県指定史跡に指定された。現在では史跡整備のうえで毛野国白石丘陵公園内で公開されている。 === 来歴 === * [[1938年]]（[[昭和]]13年）の『上毛古墳綜覧』に「平井村580号墳」として登載。 * [[1988年]]（昭和63年）、史跡整備に伴う範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[1989年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 * [[1992年]]（[[平成]]4年）5月15日、群馬県指定史跡に指定。 * [[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（平成25-26年度）、範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[2015年]]に報告書刊行）。 == 埋葬施設 == 主体部の埋葬施設としては両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室である。石室の規模は次の通り。 * 石室全長：8.33メートル * 玄室：長さ3.52メートル、奥幅2.1メートル、高さ1.6メートル * 前室：長さ1.89メートル * 羨道：長さ2.64メートル 玄室は凝灰岩の切石の切組手法により、前室・羨道は川原石の乱石積みによって構築される{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。玄室の中央には凝灰岩の間仕切り石3石が据えられて玄室の奥・手前を区画するほか、玄門の間には凝灰岩の梱石が据えられる{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 石室の前庭部では須恵器（提瓶・平瓶）・盾形埴輪が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 == 文化財 == === 群馬県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 皇子塚古墳 - 1992年（平成4年）5月15日指定{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf 群馬県内の県指定文化財一覧]}}（群馬県ホームページ）。[https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳]（藤岡市ホームページ）。。 == 関連施設 == * 藤岡歴史館（藤岡市白石） - 皇子塚古墳の出土品等を保管・展示。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * 史跡説明板（群馬県教育委員会・藤岡市教育委員会設置） * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1989|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳（範囲確認調査報告書IV）|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[白石古墳群]] == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳] - 藤岡市ホームページ {{DEFAULTSORT:おうしつかこふん ふしおかし}} [[Category:群馬県の古墳]] [[Category:藤岡市の歴史]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:群馬県指定史跡]]

玄室は凝灰岩の切石の切組手法により、前室・羨道は川原石の乱石積みによって構築される{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。玄室の中央には凝灰岩の間仕切り石3石が据えられて玄室の奥・手前を区画するほか、玄門の間には凝灰岩の梱石が据えられる{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 石室の前庭部では須恵器（提瓶・平瓶）・盾形埴輪が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 == 文化財 == === 群馬県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 皇子塚古墳 - 1992年（平成4年）5月15日指定{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf 群馬県内の県指定文化財一覧]}}（群馬県ホームページ）。[https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳]（藤岡市ホームページ）。。 == 関連施設 == * 藤岡歴史館（藤岡市白石） - 皇子塚古墳の出土品等を保管・展示。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 皇子塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘 |別名 = |所属 = [[白石古墳群]] |所在地 = [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木（字東原）
（毛野国白石丘陵公園内） |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 15|緯度秒 = 33.72 |経度度 =139|経度分 = 2|経度秒 = 30.10 |ISO = JP-10 |形状 = [[円墳]] |規模 = 直径31m（30m）
高さ6m |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]] |出土品 = [[装飾大刀]]・弓金具・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉・馬具・[[埴輪]]・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]後半 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 群馬県指定史跡「皇子塚古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図2 = {{Location map|Japan Gunma|label=皇子塚古墳|lat_deg=36|lat_min=15|lat_sec=33.72|lon_deg=139|lon_min=02|lon_sec=30.10|mark=円墳.png|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=群馬県内の位置}} '''皇子塚古墳'''（おうじづかこふん）は、[[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[円墳]]。[[白石古墳群]]を構成する古墳の1つ。群馬県指定[[史跡]]に指定されている。 == 概要 == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|左に[[平井地区1号墳]]、右に皇子塚古墳}}]] [[ファイル:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|thumb|200px|right|{{center|単龍環頭大刀柄頭}}{{small|藤岡歴史館展示。}}]] 群馬県南部、鮎川左岸において舌状に張り出した河岸段丘東端に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。北には[[平井地区1号墳]]が隣接する。[[1988年]]（[[昭和]]63年）・[[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（[[平成]]25-26年度）に範囲確認調査が実施されている。 墳形は円形で、直径31メートル（または30メートル{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}）・高さ6メートルを測る史跡説明板。。墳丘は4段築成。墳丘表面では[[葺石]]のほか[[円筒埴輪]]・[[形象埴輪]]（人物形・馬形・盾形・靫形・大刀形・翳形・鞆形埴輪など）が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。埋葬施設は両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室であり、石室内部からは[[装飾大刀]]の金銅装単龍環頭大刀柄頭のほか弓金具2・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉3・馬具が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。築造時期は[[古墳時代]]後期の[[6世紀]]後半頃と推定され（平井地区1号墳とほぼ同時期）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}、[[7世紀]]前半までの追葬が認められる。 古墳域は[[1992年]]（平成4年）に群馬県指定史跡に指定された。現在では史跡整備のうえで毛野国白石丘陵公園内で公開されている。 === 来歴 === * [[1938年]]（[[昭和]]13年）の『上毛古墳綜覧』に「平井村580号墳」として登載。 * [[1988年]]（昭和63年）、史跡整備に伴う範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[1989年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 * [[1992年]]（[[平成]]4年）5月15日、群馬県指定史跡に指定。 * [[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（平成25-26年度）、範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[2015年]]に報告書刊行）。 == 埋葬施設 == 埋葬施設としては両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室である。石室の規模は次の通り。 * 石室全長：8.33メートル * 玄室：長さ3.52メートル、奥幅2.1メートル、高さ1.6メートル * 前室：長さ1.89メートル * 羨道：長さ2.64メートル 玄室は凝灰岩の切石の切組手法により、前室・羨道は川原石の乱石積みによって構築される{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。玄室の中央には凝灰岩の間仕切り石3石が据えられて玄室の奥・手前を区画するほか、玄門の間には凝灰岩の梱石が据えられる{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 石室の前庭部では須恵器（提瓶・平瓶）・盾形埴輪が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 == 文化財 == === 群馬県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 皇子塚古墳 - 1992年（平成4年）5月15日指定{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf （毛野国白石丘陵公園内） |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 15|緯度秒 = 33.72 |経度度 =139|経度分 = 2|経度秒 = 30.10 |ISO = JP-10 |形状 = [[円墳]] |規模 = 直径31m（30m）
高さ6m |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]] |出土品 = [[装飾大刀]]・弓金具・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉・馬具・[[埴輪]]・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]後半 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 群馬県指定史跡「皇子塚古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図2 = {{Location map|Japan Gunma|label=皇子塚古墳|lat_deg=36|lat_min=15|lat_sec=33.72|lon_deg=139|lon_min=02|lon_sec=30.10|mark=円墳.png|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=群馬県内の位置}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E}}}} }} '''皇子塚古墳'''（おうじづかこふん）は、[[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[円墳]]。[[白石古墳群]]を構成する古墳の1つ。群馬県指定[[史跡]]に指定されている。 == 概要 == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|左に[[平井地区1号墳]]、右に皇子塚古墳}}]] 群馬県南部、鮎川左岸において舌状に張り出した河岸段丘東端に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。北には[[平井地区1号墳]]が隣接する。[[1988年]]（[[昭和]]63年）・[[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（[[平成]]25-26年度）に範囲確認調査が実施されている。 墳形は円形で、直径31メートル（または30メートル{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}）・高さ6メートルを測る史跡説明板。。墳丘は4段築成。墳丘表面では[[葺石]]のほか[[円筒埴輪]]・[[形象埴輪]]（人物形・馬形・盾形・靫形・大刀形・翳形・鞆形埴輪など）が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。埋葬施設は両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室であり、石室内部からは[[装飾大刀]]の金銅装単龍環頭大刀柄頭のほか弓金具2・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉3・馬具が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。築造時期は[[古墳時代]]後期の[[6世紀]]後半頃と推定され（平井地区1号墳とほぼ同時期）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}、[[7世紀]]前半までの追葬が認められる。 古墳域は[[1992年]]（平成4年）に群馬県指定史跡に指定された。現在では史跡整備のうえで毛野国白石丘陵公園内で公開されている。 === 来歴 === * [[1938年]]（[[昭和]]13年）の『上毛古墳綜覧』に「平井村第580号墳」として登載。 * [[1988年]]（昭和63年）、史跡整備に伴う範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[1989年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 * [[1992年]]（[[平成]]4年）5月15日、群馬県指定史跡に指定。 * [[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（平成25-26年度）、範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[2015年]]に報告書刊行）。 == 埋葬施設 == 埋葬施設としては両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室である。石室の規模は次の通り。 * 石室全長：8.33メートル * 玄室：長さ3.52メートル、奥幅2.1メートル、高さ1.6メートル * 前室：長さ1.89メートル * 羨道：長さ2.64メートル 玄室は凝灰岩の切石の切組手法により、前室・羨道は川原石の乱石積みによって構築される{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。玄室の中央には凝灰岩の間仕切り石3石が据えられて玄室の奥・手前を区画するほか、玄門の間には凝灰岩の梱石が据えられる{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 石室の前庭部では須恵器（提瓶・平瓶）・盾形埴輪が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 ファイル:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|単龍環頭大刀柄頭
{{small|藤岡歴史館展示。}} ファイル:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|盾形埴輪
{{small|藤岡歴史館展示。}} == 文化財 == === 群馬県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 皇子塚古墳 - 1992年（平成4年）5月15日指定{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf 群馬県内の県指定文化財一覧]}}（群馬県ホームページ）。[https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳]（藤岡市ホームページ）。。 == 関連施設 == * 藤岡歴史館（藤岡市白石） - 皇子塚古墳の出土品等を保管・展示。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * 史跡説明板（群馬県教育委員会・藤岡市教育委員会設置） * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1989|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳（範囲確認調査報告書IV）|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[白石古墳群]] == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳] - 藤岡市ホームページ {{DEFAULTSORT:おうしつかこふん ふしおかし}} [[Category:群馬県の古墳]] [[Category:藤岡市の歴史]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:群馬県指定史跡]]

墳丘 |別名 = |所属 = [[白石古墳群]] |所在地 = [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木（字東原）
（毛野国白石丘陵公園内） |緯度度 = 36|緯度分 = 15|緯度秒 = 33.72 |経度度 =139|経度分 = 2|経度秒 = 30.10 |ISO = JP-10 |形状 = [[円墳]] |規模 = 直径31m（30m）
高さ6m |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]] |出土品 = [[装飾大刀]]・弓金具・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉・馬具・[[埴輪]]・[[須恵器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[6世紀]]後半 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 群馬県指定史跡「皇子塚古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図2 = {{Location map|Japan Gunma|label=皇子塚古墳|lat_deg=36|lat_min=15|lat_sec=33.72|lon_deg=139|lon_min=02|lon_sec=30.10|mark=円墳.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=群馬県内の位置}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E}}}} }} '''皇子塚古墳'''（おうじづかこふん）は、[[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]三ツ木にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[円墳]]。[[白石古墳群]]を構成する古墳の1つ。群馬県指定[[史跡]]に指定されている。 == 概要 == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|左に[[平井地区1号墳]]、右に皇子塚古墳}}]] 群馬県南部、鮎川左岸において舌状に張り出した河岸段丘東端に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。北には[[平井地区1号墳]]が隣接する。[[1988年]]（[[昭和]]63年）・[[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（[[平成]]25-26年度）に範囲確認調査が実施されている。 墳形は円形で、直径31メートル（または30メートル{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}）・高さ6メートルを測る史跡説明板。。墳丘は4段築成。墳丘表面では[[葺石]]のほか[[円筒埴輪]]・[[形象埴輪]]（人物形・馬形・盾形・靫形・大刀形・翳形・鞆形埴輪など）が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。埋葬施設は両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室であり、石室内部からは[[装飾大刀]]の金銅装単龍環頭大刀柄頭のほか弓金具2・鉄鏃・耳環・小玉3・馬具が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。築造時期は[[古墳時代]]後期の[[6世紀]]後半頃と推定され（平井地区1号墳とほぼ同時期）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}、[[7世紀]]前半までの追葬が認められる。 古墳域は[[1992年]]（平成4年）に群馬県指定史跡に指定された。現在では史跡整備のうえで毛野国白石丘陵公園内で公開されている。 == 遺跡歴 == * [[1938年]]（[[昭和]]13年）の『上毛古墳綜覧』に「平井村第580号墳」として登載。 * [[1988年]]（昭和63年）、史跡整備に伴う範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[1989年]]に報告書刊行）{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 * [[1992年]]（[[平成]]4年）5月15日、群馬県指定史跡に指定。 * [[2013年|2013]]-[[2014年]]度（平成25-26年度）、範囲確認調査（藤岡市教育委員会、[[2015年]]に報告書刊行）。 == 埋葬施設 == 埋葬施設としては両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南東方向に開口する。玄室・前室からなる複室構造の石室である。石室の規模は次の通り。 * 石室全長：8.33メートル * 玄室：長さ3.52メートル、奥幅2.1メートル、高さ1.6メートル * 前室：長さ1.89メートル * 羨道：長さ2.64メートル 玄室は凝灰岩の切石の切組手法により、前室・羨道は川原石の乱石積みによって構築される{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。玄室の中央には凝灰岩の間仕切り石3石が据えられて玄室の奥・手前を区画するほか、玄門の間には凝灰岩の梱石が据えられる{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 石室の前庭部では須恵器（提瓶・平瓶）・盾形埴輪が検出されている{{Sfn|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 ファイル:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|単龍環頭大刀柄頭
{{small|藤岡歴史館展示。}} ファイル:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|盾形埴輪
{{small|藤岡歴史館展示。}} == 文化財 == === 群馬県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 皇子塚古墳 - 1992年（平成4年）5月15日指定{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf 群馬県内の県指定文化財一覧]}}（群馬県ホームページ）。[https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳]（藤岡市ホームページ）。。 == 関連施設 == * 藤岡歴史館（藤岡市白石） - 皇子塚古墳の出土品等を保管・展示。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * 史跡説明板（群馬県教育委員会・藤岡市教育委員会設置） * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1989|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳（範囲確認調査報告書IV）|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[白石古墳群]] == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html 皇子塚古墳] - 藤岡市ホームページ {{DEFAULTSORT:おうしつかこふん ふしおかし}} [[Category:群馬県の古墳]] [[Category:藤岡市の歴史]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:群馬県指定史跡]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[ja:皇子塚古墳]]

Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=]][[ja:%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E8%97%A4%E5%B2%A1%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:皇子塚古墳]]

The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel

{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] [[Category:last 100]][[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:last 100]][[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[Category:last 100]][[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:last 100]][[Category:Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[category:most recent 500]][[ja:%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E8%97%A4%E5%B2%A1%E5%B8%82)]] [[category:most recent 500]][[ja:皇子塚古墳]]

{{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa

{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa

It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] [[category:original pages]] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[category:original pages]] [[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[category:original pages]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[category:original pages]] [[Category:Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[ja:%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E8%97%A4%E5%B2%A1%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:dd]] [[ja:皇子塚古墳]]

{{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa

It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] [[Category:Link complete]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:kkkk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[ja:%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E8%97%A4%E5%B2%A1%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:皇子塚古墳]]

{{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa

Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] [[Category:Link complete]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:kkkk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[ja:%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E8%97%A4%E5%B2%A1%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:kk]]{{Kofun navbar}}[[Category:kk]] [[ja:皇子塚古墳]]

Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - revision.text:
{{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] [[Category:Link complete]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)-qq]] [[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)-qq]] [[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)-qq]] [[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:kkkk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)-qq]] [[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[ja:%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E8%97%A4%E5%B2%A1%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] {{Kofun navbar}} [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:kk]] [[ja:皇子塚古墳]]

It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel

{{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - {{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa

Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - {{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] [[Category:Link complete]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)-qq]] [[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)-qq]] [[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)-qq]] [[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:kkkk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)-qq]] [[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[ja:%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E8%97%A4%E5%B2%A1%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] {{Kofun navbar}} [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:皇子塚古墳]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōji-zuka Kofun (Fujioka)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website] revision.text:
{{Infobox burial site | name = Ōjizuka Kofun | image = [[File:Ojizuka Kofun (Fujioka), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Tumulus mound | other_name = | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|33.72|N|139|02|30.10|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳}} | size = Diameter: 31 m (or 30 m)
Height: 6 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀}}, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, horse tack, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}}, and {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} (late 6th century) | status = Designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site }} '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (皇子塚古墳) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|ja|藤岡市}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}}, Right: Ōjizuka Kofun}}]] Ōjizuka Kofun was constructed on a tongue-shaped terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun|ja|平井地区1号墳}} is located to the north. Archaeological surveys were conducted in 1988 and from 2013 to 2014 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The kofun is circular, with a diameter of 31 meters (or 30 meters) and a height of 6 meters. Its mound is terraced in four tiers. Artifacts such as {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}}, and {{ill|haniwa figurines|ja|形象埴輪}} (including human, horse, shield, quiver, sword, and fan shapes) have been discovered.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室}} with an entrance facing southeast. Constructed in the late 6th century (near the same period as Hirai Area No. 1 Kofun),{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} the chamber contained decorated swords, bow fittings, iron arrowheads, earrings, small beads, and horse tack. Secondary burials occurred into the early 7th century. The site is part of the Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park and has been preserved for public access. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber with the following dimensions: * Total length: 8.33 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.52 meters, width 2.1 meters, height 1.6 meters * Ante-chamber: Length 1.89 meters * Passageway: Length 2.64 meters The main chamber is constructed of neatly cut tuff blocks, while the ante-chamber and passageway are made of river stones.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Inside the chamber, tuff partition stones divide the main chamber, and an additional tuff stone is placed at the chamber entrance.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Artifacts found in the chamber include {{ill|Sue ware|ja|須恵器}} vessels and shield-shaped haniwa.{{Harv|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 単龍環頭大刀柄頭.JPG|Single-dragon pommel
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} File:皇子塚古墳 (藤岡市) 出土 盾形埴輪.JPG|Shield-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Fujioka History Museum.}} == Cultural Heritage == === Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites === * '''Ōjizuka Kofun''' (designated May 15, 1992){{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture website). == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Exhibits artifacts from Ōjizuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=皇子塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|皇子塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=皇子塚古墳 -平成25・26年度範囲確認調査報告書-|publisher=藤岡市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/oudidukakohun.html Ōjizuka Kofun - Fujioka City website]
